commands.test_subset: cargo test -p opengoose-types -p opengoose-profiles -p opengoose-persistence -p opengoose-projects
commands.test_full: cargo test --workspace (requires network for goose git dep + dbus for keyring)
commands.notes: Full workspace build requires: libxcb1-dev, libdbus-1-dev, pkg-config, network access for goose git dep. opengoose-web fails with v8 download error.

testing_notes.note: opengoose-projects newly confirmed testable offline (27 tests). Persistence jumped from 122→244 tests between 2026-03-10 and 2026-03-11 — maintainer very active. All offline crates well-saturated. session_store tests use #![cfg(test)] file-level attribute (not #[cfg(test)]) — grep must account for this.

completed_work.description: Task 3: Added 7 tests to opengoose-projects (3 in store.rs error paths, 4 in project.rs truncation/utility). PR created on branch test-assist/projects-error-handling-and-truncation.
Task 6: Assessed persistence test infrastructure. test_db() duplicated ~7 times, ensure_session() duplicated 3 times. Low-priority code smell only.
Task 5: Commented on issue #51 (Duplicate Error Enums).
Added 2 tests to main: StreamStarted/Updated/Completed Display + empty GOOSE_RECIPE_PATH guard.
PR #52: 4 tests for YamlFileStore::list() extension filtering + WorkItemStore::set_input(). Merged 2026-03-08.

testing_backlog.item: opengoose-core SessionManager - complex cache-DB consistency logic, no tests. Blocked by goose network dep.
opengoose-teams chain/router/fan_out executors - complex orchestration logic.
testing_backlog.notes: Cannot test in sandbox - needs network for goose dep

testing_backlog.item: opengoose-persistence test_db()/ensure_session() duplication - low priority code smell
testing_backlog.notes: 7 duplicates of test_db(), 3 of ensure_session(); not urgent
